moduleTitle: Neutron Radiographic Work Practices and Explosive-Device Safety

lessons.title: Radioactive Contamination Control for NR Work
objectives: State clothing requirements for working where radioactive contamination is possible

lessons.title: NR Operating and Emergency Procedures
objectives: Describe operation and emergency procedures applicable to neutron radiography
Identify the specific procedures required for NR facilities and operations

lessons.title: Explosive-Device Safety: Static Electricity, Grounding, and Clothing
objectives: Explain the static electricity hazard when radiographing explosive devices
Describe grounding devices and their proper use
State clothing requirements for explosive-device work

lessons.title: Explosive Devices: Handling, Storage, Shipping, and Licensing
objectives: Describe handling and storage requirements and procedures for explosive devices
Identify state and federal explosive-licensing requirements
cp105Topics: 6.4 Handling and storage requirements and procedures
